evals.name: Extracts action items with owners and deadlines
evals.description: When a transcript contains clearly assigned tasks, the agent should extract them with the named owner and any stated deadline.
evals.input: Here are my meeting notes: 'John will send the updated budget to Sarah by Friday. Maria agreed to draft the partner communication by end of next week. The team decided to delay the launch by two weeks. No decision yet on the venue.'

rubric.pass_condition: Output contains an Action Items table with John and Maria's tasks, a Decisions section noting the launch delay, and an Open Questions section noting the venue is unresolved

evals.name: Distinguishes decisions from open discussion
evals.description: The agent should correctly separate things that were decided from things that were merely discussed.
evals.input: Transcript: 'We talked a lot about whether to expand to three new countries next year. Some people were in favor, others wanted to wait. In the end we agreed to pilot in one country first. We also discussed budget timing but did not reach a conclusion.'

rubric.pass_condition: Agent records the pilot decision correctly and puts budget timing in Open Questions, not Decisions

evals.name: Flags commitments to external parties
evals.description: For external meetings, the agent should specifically call out commitments made to partners or grantees.
evals.input: Meeting notes from partner call with Nairobi Health Institute: 'We promised to send them the data sharing agreement by Wednesday. They will provide updated enrollment numbers by month end. We said we would schedule a follow-up call in 6 weeks.'

rubric.pass_condition: Agent captures all three commitments and flags them as external commitments

evals.name: Flags ambiguous content rather than fabricating details
evals.description: When notes are incomplete or vague, the agent should flag unclear items rather than guessing.
evals.input: Quick notes: 'Discussed Q3 targets. Tom to follow up. Agreed on the thing from last time. Need to check with legal. Budget approved.'

rubric.pass_condition: Agent flags at least 2 ambiguous items (e.g. 'the thing from last time', unspecified Q3 targets) rather than fabricating details
